product_overview: Zedidearena is a local OpenAI-compatible API server that routes requests to Google's DiffusionGemma 26B A4B-IT model through NVIDIA's NIM API. It enables OpenCode and other OpenAI clients to interact with the model locally via standard OpenAI-style endpoints.
core_goals: Provide a local FastAPI server that exposes OpenAI-compatible endpoints
Route chat completion requests to NVIDIA NIM using a valid NVIDIA API key
Support streaming chat completions for compatible clients such as OpenCode
Offer model discovery and health-check endpoints for local integration
Validate connectivity to NVIDIA through a dedicated test script and startup workflow

features.name: DiffusionGemma Local API Server
features.description: A local FastAPI server that provides OpenAI-compatible access to DiffusionGemma through NVIDIA's NIM API.
user_flows: GET / with no auth -> Receive 200 with server status and message -> GET /v1/models -> Receive 200 with available models in OpenAI-compatible format -> POST /v1/chat/completions with valid model and messages -> Receive 200 with chat completion response

POST /v1/chat/completions with malformed body or missing required fields -> Receive 400 validation error -> Correct request payload and resend POST /v1/chat/completions -> Receive 200 with completion response

POST /v1/completions from a legacy OpenAI client -> Receive 400 instructing use of /v1/chat/completions instead -> POST /v1/chat/completions with equivalent prompt converted to messages -> Receive 200 with chat completion response

features.name: Streaming Chat Completions
features.description: Supports streamed responses for clients that need incremental output from the model.
user_flows: POST /v1/chat/completions with stream=true and valid messages -> Receive 200 streamed OpenAI-compatible chunks -> Client assembles the full assistant response

POST /v1/chat/completions with stream=true but invalid request payload -> Receive 400 validation error -> Resubmit POST /v1/chat/completions with corrected body and stream=true -> Receive 200 streamed response

features.name: NVIDIA API Connectivity Validation
features.description: A test script and startup path that verify the server can reach NVIDIA's API using the configured key.
user_flows: Run test_api.py against the configured NVIDIA API endpoint -> Receive a successful connectivity and response validation result -> Start the local FastAPI server on port 8000 -> Server remains available for OpenAI-compatible requests

Run test_api.py with an invalid or missing NVIDIA_API_KEY -> Receive API authentication or connectivity failure -> Update environment configuration with a valid key and rerun test_api.py -> Receive successful validation

features.name: Local Client and OpenCode Integration
features.description: Client and configuration support for using the local server from OpenCode or other OpenAI-compatible tools.
user_flows: Start the local server on localhost:8000 -> Configure OpenCode to target the local OpenAI-compatible base URL -> POST /v1/chat/completions from OpenCode with valid messages -> Receive 200 and use the model locally
OpenCode sends GET /v1/models to discover models -> Receive 200 with model list -> OpenCode selects a model and POSTs /v1/chat/completions -> Receive 200 completion response

OpenCode or another client sends a request to localhost while the server is not running -> Receive connection failure at the client layer -> Start the server with start_server.sh and retry the request -> Receive 200 from the API

features.name: DiffusionGemma Local API Server
features.description: Local FastAPI server that exposes an OpenAI-compatible API for Google's DiffusionGemma 26B A4B-IT model through NVIDIA's NIM API.

endpoints.description: List available models in OpenAI-compatible format
Chat completions endpoint compatible with OpenAI clients

known_limitations.issue: NVIDIA API key is embedded in project files and shell scripts
known_limitations.impact: Secrets may be accidentally committed or exposed

known_limitations.issue: No local unit tests are currently present
Legacy /v1/completions endpoint returns 400 instead of forwarding to chat completions
